title: An Ordinance authorizing the temporary closure of the entire stretch of Luna street and Villegas street in Barangay Baybayin and a portion of Lopez Avenue in Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños, Laguna, as well as the temporary suspension of the implementation of section 4.1.6 (a) of Ordinance no. 2017-1619, for the conduct of events in celebration of the 23rd Banamos Festival in conjunction with the 409th Foundation Anniversary of Los Baños
